envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: AION SDK API key used for market reads and trade execution.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional private key for external-wallet self-custody live trading on Polymarket.

envVars.name: WALLET_ADDRESS
envVars.description: Optional wallet address for personalized context checks.

envVars.name: RUN_LIVE
envVars.description: Set to true to allow live trading without passing --live.

envVars.name: TRADE_AMOUNT_USD
envVars.description: Trade amount in USD. Default is 1.

envVars.name: POLITICS_QUERY
envVars.description: Optional primary search keyword. Default is politics.
